description: Diagnose the DiffDock environment: Python version, PyTorch + CUDA, PyTorch Geometric, core deps (numpy/scipy/pandas/RDKit/biopython), ESM, and DiffDock files/checkpoints (read-only).
rules: read-only — imports/inspects only, never installs or modifies the environment
missing optional libraries are reported as failures, not crashes
full diagnostic report written to record_store
usage: Optionally set VERBOSE (any non-empty value enables --verbose). Output: setup_check.txt.
limitation: Reports availability only; it does not install dependencies or download checkpoints. Checkpoint/DiffDock-file checks reflect the current working directory.
